# menus.am

> menus.am is an Armenian SaaS platform for creating QR menus and online menus
> for restaurants, cafés, bars, bakeries and other food & hospitality businesses.
> Owners build a digital menu in minutes, get a QR code for their tables, manage
> everything from one admin panel, and update prices and items in real time. The
> menu supports 3 languages (Armenian, Russian, English) with AI translation and
> AI descriptions. Pricing is in Armenian dram (AMD) and starts at 4,900 ֏/month.
> Built in and for Armenia, with local support.

## Key facts
- Product: QR Menu & Online Menu platform (digital restaurant menus)
- Country: Armenia (Yerevan); interface & pricing localized (AMD)
- Languages: Armenian, Russian, English (per-menu, auto-switching)
- Plans: Starter (from 4,900 ֏/mo), Professional (9,900 ֏/mo), Business (29,900 ֏/mo)
- Key features: QR code menu, real-time updates, premium themes, AI translation,
  AI descriptions, multi-language, image management, availability toggle,
  custom domain (Business), analytics (Business)
- Company: Rosami LLC
- Contact: menusam9995@gmail.com, +374 93 632 003

## Main pages
- [Home](https://menus.am/): platform overview, features, pricing, FAQ
- [QR Menu](https://menus.am/qr-menu): what a QR Menu is and how to create one
- [Online Menu](https://menus.am/online-menu): online menu for restaurants
- [Restaurant Menu](https://menus.am/restaurant-menu): restaurant digital menu guide
- [Smart Menu](https://menus.am/smart-menu): AI-powered smart menu
- [QR Menu Armenia](https://menus.am/qr-menu-armenia): QR menus for Armenian venues
- [Blog](https://menus.am/blog): guides and articles on QR/online/digital menus

## Notes
- A live restaurant menu is served at https://menus.am/<restaurant-slug>
- Sitemap: https://menus.am/sitemap.xml
